page.title: Super Phoenix Teladi
page.t: The Super Phoenix is a Teladi refinement of the Phoenix E, rebuilt as a profit-minded capital hunter for commanders who consider overwhelming firepower a sound investment. The design keeps the Phoenix silhouette and Teladi main batteries, but sacrifices some of the destroyer's broad utility for heavier direct-fire engagements against large threats. Expensive to field and licensed through Ministry channels, it is intended to keep trade routes open, protect valuable assets, and ensure hostile capital ships become bad investments.
